author: Francis of Meyronnes
title: Quaestiones de Celebratione Missarum?
remarks:
De Celebratione Missarum: MS Naples, Naz. VII.E.17 ff. 1-10; VIII.A.23 ff. 83-90v. Roest, 363ff; should be seen in the context of his other academic expositions on the articles of faith, the ten commandments, faith and the symbolon. For a general discussion of these works, see: Roth, Franziskus von Mayronis OFM, passim; H. Roßmann, ‘Die Quodlibeta und verschiedene sonstige Schriften des Franz von Meyronnes OFM’, FrSt 54 (1972),
1–76. The collection treats various special questions on the Eucharist, transubstantiation, reception, fasting, etc.  [[Then it's not the same as that described in Franz 494/5]]
